message:
🐛 Fix rocket scroll v7: block all + momentum detection + clamped synthetic re-dispatch (#164)

- Block ALL native wheel events in capture phase with passive:false
- Detect macOS trackpad momentum scrolling via delta decay patterns
- Re-dispatch controlled synthetic events with deltaY clamped to ±3
- Module-level isSynthetic flag prevents capture handler re-catching
- Momentum detection: 3 consecutive decaying rapid events triggers block
- Momentum resets after 300ms pause (user lifted finger)
- Throttle at 120ms (~8 events/sec max)
- 15 scroll tests updated to verify v7 behavior

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
